40+ Years Experience
Our Story

A Place of Peace,
Built with Purpose

Cheyenne Horse Ranch is a privately owned, family-oriented boarding facility nestled among mature trees in Leander, TX. Owner Tom Whitecloud — a professional horseman and transporter with over 40 years of experience — lives on site, ensuring your horse receives attentive, personal care every single day.

This is not a commercial operation. It's a quiet, tranquil retreat where horses thrive in a calm, park-like setting that truly feels like home.

Horses are fed twice daily. Owners provide their own bagged grain, and coastal and alfalfa hay are available on site to meet your horse's specific nutritional needs. All stalls feature raised mats in the feeding area to keep hooves clean and dry.

What We Offer

Boarding. Training. Transport.

🐴

Horse Boarding

Full-care boarding in spacious pens with shade or cover. Horses are fed twice daily — owners provide bagged grain, with coastal and alfalfa hay available on site. Owner lives on the property 24/7 for peace of mind.

🤠

Training

Professional on-site training available for your horse. Whether you're working on groundwork, manners, or riding development, experienced hands are here to help your horse reach its potential.

🚚

Transport

Safe, reliable horse transport by a seasoned professional with over 40 years on the road. Whether moving locally or across the region, your horse travels with the same care it receives at the ranch.

The Property

Everything Your Horse Needs

Large Pens w/ Shade or Cover

Spacious individual pens designed for comfort, with natural shade from mature trees or covered structures.

2 Round Pens

Dedicated round pens ideal for groundwork, lunging, and training sessions in a safe, enclosed environment.

Arena Size Riding Paddock

A full arena-sized paddock for riding and exercise — plenty of room for horses to move freely.

3 Grazing Turnouts

Three lush grazing turnout areas where horses can relax, socialize, and enjoy open pasture time.

Wash Rack · Tack Shed · Hay Shed

All the essentials: a dedicated wash rack, secure tack storage, and a full hay shed stocked with coastal and alfalfa.

Trailer Parking

Convenient on-site trailer parking available for all boarders.

Conveniently located near two expansive riding destinations —
River Ranch Regional Park in Liberty Hill and Garey Park in Georgetown.
Miles of trails, right from your backyard.
